---
title: "Collision Frequency Trends for Various Vehicle Types in the Greater Toronto Area"
subtitle: "INF2167 Project - Group 7"
author: 
  - Stella Gregorski
  - Yiying Qin
format: 
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    pdf-separate-fragments: true
    theme: dracula
editor: visual
date: today
date-format: long
bibliography: Presentation_References.bib
---

## Introduction
- Provide background on the topic

## Motivation
- Introduce the main research question or problem
- Explain why the project is important

## Data
- Describe the data sources used
- How the data were collected or constructed

## Methods
- Methods or analytical approaches used to address the research question
- This project used the R programming language [@cite-R] and the Here library [@cite-here] to do reproducible data analysis.

## Findings
- Present the main results, patterns, or insights from the analysis

## Implications
- Discuss findings and what they may indicate

## Conclusion
- Key takeaways from the project, including the broader implications or contributions of the work
- Future research ideas

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
